projectDescription: A fast, strict, and strongly-typed data generator (faker) for C# powered by Source Generators, enabling declarative model faking with compile-time enforcement of required properties, nullability, and type safety.
keyFeatures: Source-generated fakers — no reflection, fully trim/AOT compatible
Compile-time enforcement of required properties via C# required modifier
Deterministic generation with seeded Random instances
Built-in generators for text, numbers, dates, GUIDs, usernames, and more
Memo pattern for cross-property value referencing
Nullable and struct-aware extensions (OrNull, Nullable, OrDefault)
publicApiSurface: FakeAttribute — marker attribute for classes/structs to generate a faker for
Faker<TModel> — abstract base class for generated fakers (Get(), Get(int), Get(int, int))
Forge — main entry point providing access to all generator modules (Basic, Random, Temporal, Text, Person)
Generator<T> — base generator class with fluent modifiers (Or, OrDefault, Refine, Enumerable, Array, List, HashSet, Memo, Cast)
ForgeTemporal.Between() / Past() / Future() / DateBetween() / DateInPast() / DateInFuture() / TimeBetween() / DateTimeOffsetBetween() / TimeSpanBetween()
ForgeText.Alphanumeric() / Alpha() / Pronounceable() / Lorem() / Waffle() / Hex() / Guid() / Template()
StringGeneratorExtensions: ToUpper() / ToLower() / ToTitleCase() / Capitalize() / Sentencify()
DateTimeGeneratorExtensions: ToUtc() / ToLocal() / ToDateOnly() / ToTimeOnly() / TruncateToDate()
